SELECT
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
    WITH cust_cons AS (
        SELECT c.CustomerID,
               c.Segment,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
          AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
        GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
    ),
    min_total AS (
        SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_cons FROM cust_cons
    ),
    seg_avg AS (
        SELECT Segment,
               AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_cons
        FROM cust_cons, min_total
        WHERE total_consumption = min_total.min_cons
        GROUP BY Segment
    )
    SELECT 1
) AS dummy;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT Segment, pct_growth
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        (y13.total - y12.total) * 100.0 / y12.total AS pct_growth
    FROM (
        SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth
        WHERE substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
        GROUP BY CustomerID
    ) y12
    JOIN (
        SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth
        WHERE substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
        GROUP BY CustomerID
    ) y13 ON y12.CustomerID = y13.CustomerID
    JOIN customers c ON y12.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) growth
WHERE pct_growth = (SELECT MAX(pct_growth) FROM growth)
   OR pct_growth = (SELECT MIN(pct_growth) FROM growth);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT fr.year,

       fr.date,
       fr.time
FROM (
    WITH first_qual AS (
        SELECT q.driverId,
               MIN(julianday(r.date || ' ' || COALESCE(r.time, '00:00:00'))) AS first_jd
        FROM qualifying q
        JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
        GROUP BY q.driverId
    ),
    first_race AS (
        SELECT fq.driverId,
               r.raceId,
               r.year,
               r.name,
               r.date,
               r.time,
               julianday(r.date || ' ' || COALESCE(r.time, '00:00:00')) AS jd
        FROM first_qual fq
        JOIN qualifying q ON q.driverId = fq.driverId
        JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
        WHERE julianday(r.date || ' ' || COALESCE(r.time, '00:00:00')) = fq.first_jd
    )
    SELECT fr.driverId,
           fr.year,
           fr.name,
           fr.date,
           fr.time,
           (fr.jd - julianday(d.dob)) AS age_at_first_qual
    FROM first_race fr
    JOIN drivers d ON fr.driverId = d.driverId
) fr
ORDER BY fr.age_at_first_qual ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	formula_1

JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
LEFT JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE d.A10 > 8000 AND d.A10 <= 9000
  AND l.loan_id IS NULL;	----- bird -----	financial
489:
SELECT AVG(d.A10) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district d
WHERE d.A10 > 4000
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM account a
      WHERE a.district_id = d.district_id
        AND a.date >= '1997-01-01'
  );	----- bird -----	financial
490:
SELECT trans.*
FROM trans
JOIN disp ON trans.account_id = disp.account_id
WHERE disp.client_id = 3356
  AND trans.type = 'withdrawal';	----- bird -----	financial
491:
SELECT
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN lower(gender) = 'female' OR gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS female_percentage
FROM client
WHERE district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A10 > 10000
);	----- bird -----	financial
492:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN sum1996 = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (sum1997 - sum1996) * 100.0 / sum1996
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount END) AS sum1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1997' THEN loan.amount END) AS sum1997
    FROM loan
    JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
    JOIN disp ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
    JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
    WHERE client.gender = 'M'
);	----- bird -----	financial
493:
SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*)
     FROM trans t
     JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
     WHERE d.client_id = 3
       AND t.type = 'statement') AS request_count,
    (SELECT t.operation
     FROM trans t
     JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
     WHERE d.client_id = 3
     GROUP BY t.operation
     HAVING SUM(t.amount) = 3539
     LIMIT 1) AS purpose;	----- bird -----	financial
494:
SELECT
    ROUND(100.0 *
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
         FROM client c
         JOIN disp d ON d.client_id = c.client_id
         JOIN account a ON a.account_id = d.account_id
         WHERE c.gender = 'M' AND a.frequency = 'weekly')
        /
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
         FROM client c
         WHERE c.gender = 'M')
    , 2) AS percent_male_weekly;	----- bird -----	financial
495:
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN district dist ON dist.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
  AND dist.A10 = (SELECT MIN(A10) FROM district);	----- bird -----	financial
496:
SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan AS l
JOIN account AS a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'active'
  AND a.frequency = 'after each transaction';	----- bird -----	financial
497:
SELECT c.client_id,
       c.gender,
       c.birth_date,
       CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date))/365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age,
       cr.card_id,
       cr.type AS card_type,
       cr.issued
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN loan l ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN card cr ON cr.disp_id = d.disp_id
WHERE cr.type = 'credit';	----- bird -----	financial
498:
SELECT a.account_id,
       d.A2 AS district_name,
       d.A3 AS region
FROM account AS a
JOIN district AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
  AND a.frequency = 'after each transaction';	----- bird -----	financial
499:
SELECT a.account_id, a.frequency
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN client c ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN district dist ON dist.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE dist.A2 = 'Восточной Богемии'
  AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31';	----- bird -----	financial
